summary: Proxy a browser through ZAP to explore and collect real traffic.
examples: Record a login flow for authenticated testing later.
Use manual explore to hit hidden navigation paths.
diagrams: Manual explore and follow-up scan loop
content:
## Overview
Proxy a browser through ZAP to explore and collect real traffic.

### Why it matters
This guide turns a ZAP feature into a repeatable workflow you can share across teams.

### Preparation
- Confirm scope and permissions.
- Ensure required add-ons are installed.
- Decide how you will capture evidence.
title: Manual Explore with Proxy (Workflow 24)
steps: Launch the Quick Start Manual Explore browser.
Capture traffic in the History tab.
Add important URLs to scope and contexts.
Trigger follow-up scans on discovered paths.
